name: Prompt Safety Guard Plugin
description: Intercepts LLM calls with sensitive word filtering and safety model protection.

sensitiveWords.description: Sensitive words/phrases to filter from prompts.

sensitivePatterns.description: Regex patterns to detect sensitive content.

safetyModelEndpoint.description: External safety model API endpoint for content classification.

safetyModelApiKey.description: API key for the safety model endpoint.

safetyModelTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for safety model calls (default: 3000).

blockOnSafetyModelFailure.description: Whether to block when safety model is unavailable (default: false).

action.description: Action on sensitive content: block (reject), warn (log only), redact (mask content).
